messages.text:
What it is: Epic Telegram topics carry distinct musical-form icons; codify 'epics have icons representing musical forms'
What it solves: WHAT / WHY. Two deliverables from one human directive:
  (1) The three epic topics get distinct musical-form icons, wired so NEW
      epic topics get one automatically too.
  (2) Codify the rule 'Epics have icons representing musical forms' in a
      constitution prompt via the normal pipeline (n…
How it works: each seeded epic topic maps to its finalised musical-form icon
